title: Here's Why You Should Hold on to IDEXX (IDXX) Stock Right Now
text: Investors are optimistic about IDEXX (IDXX) on solid premium instrument placements and upbeat guidance.

title: Which Is A Better Pick – Kimberly-Clark Stock Or IDEXX Laboratories?
text: Given its better prospects, we believe that IDEXX Laboratories stock (NASDAQ: IDXX) is a better pick over Kimberly-Clark stock (NYSE: KMB).

title: IDEXX Laboratories: Long-Term Growth Remains Attractive
text: I recommend a buy rating for IDXX due to the company's attractive long-term growth prospects. They anticipate a recovery in growth and margin expansion. IDXX is noted for its strong fundamentals, including consistent revenue growth and expanding EBITDA margins. A forward P/E multiple of 43x is justified based on historical performance and market comparisons.
